備註：

  1. 本資料係由本校教務處、進修部、進修學院及計網中心所共同提供。
  2. 本資料僅供參考，不作其他證明之用，正式資料仍以教務處、進修部、進修學院所登錄之書面資料為準。
  3. 上述資料如需變更，請備妥相關證明文件至各部處學籍管理單位辦理。

Remarks :

  1. The above information is for reference only. Official information is based on Office of Academic Affairs, Office of Continuing Education and Computer and Network Center.
  2. If you want to change personal information, please prepare all of the required documents to contact relevant administration units of the Office of Academic Affairs (day school students) or the Office of Continuing Education (night school students)
